creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174274
pear-Mail_mimeDecode-1.5.6.patch

- Update to 1.5.6
- Remove BUILD_DEPENDS (Not necessary)
- Adding more information on pkg-descr file
- Take maintainer'ship

Changelog:

Minor Bug fix release.
#20431 - support for android
#19762 - multipart signed not split correctly on line breaks
#20027 - replace /e with preg_replace_callback
#19762 - multipart/signed eating of new line, and expose sig_hdr etc.

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: 
	poudriere: i386,  10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  12    (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 12    (OK)
